subject: █████████████
body:
Importance: High

below from █████████████

Hi Lesley,

I'm helping a friend at the doctors and should be available between 5 and 630p if we can talk then. Or anytime tomorrow before 5pm. Going to Trump speech tomorrow night - think he's going to get the nomination....

Best,

██████
